gist.headline: Tiny tales for tiny humans
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! Tiny Tales generates child-friendly, 4-page stories with adjustable word counts, perfect for bedtime reading.
gist.summary: Added Tiny Tales, a community-built app that generates child-friendly 4-page stories, to the apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use Tiny Tales to create custom, length-adjustable stories for children.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'Tiny Tales', a child-friendly story generator. Key symbols: books, children's stories, reading, bedtime. Characters: Polly the bee reading a tiny book in a cozy, nursery-like or library setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting on a giant open storybook and reading to a small group of glowing pixel fireflies. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
